expectations.text: Chooses Pydantic for config parsing (external file = trust boundary)
expectations.evidence: Uses @dataclass with 3 manual validation functions (_parse_database, _parse_tables, _parse_retry) totaling 90 lines of hand-written type checking and validation

expectations.text: Uses ConfigDict with strict=True and frozen=True
expectations.evidence: Not using Pydantic at all. Dataclasses without frozen=True.

expectations.text: Does NOT overengineer — keeps models minimal
expectations.evidence: 222 lines with manual validation helpers vs 45 lines with Pydantic. Reimplements what Pydantic does declaratively.
